content: what covenant is the best for gmurphy e3? i am using life drain now

Support: Life Drain
DPS: Dreams Of Medicine/April’s Praise/Crimsum Pulse

I've been making new teams for each chapter of story mode (about to start Ch4) but was recommended to stick with one team going forward to focus resources. This Aequor team is my favourite, and was considering locking it in as my main going forward. I don't need it to be optimal, but I'd love to know if there are any glaring holes that will force a big expensive rework later in the story.

My general game plan:
- Aurita rouse and spam Gland division for tons of hits, swap to Raging Sea then exalt
- Faros tentacle generation, exalt to bail out bad hand or incoming damage, Deep Currents to convert hits into additional poison
- Corposant rouse and produce pilots, don't cast unless high incoming damage, discard with Aurita's Power of Friendship to rapidly raise tentacle dmg. 
- Murphy tentacle generation, but mostly for Abyss Hymns. Swap to Raging Sea then Waltz

I typically run Unequal Exchange posse. I'm open to switching in an Awakener from a different Realm, but I wasn't sure how important pure Aequor is.
The first change you should make is to run the lily posse
That discard your cards and draw +2

To add to what was being said: in arc 2, the bottom talent that you can purchase on every awakener becomes active. In arc 1 it has no effect
Soulforge yep

If the event says "astral forge" the talent will also be active in it. If it says "faded legacy" it won't be

It's simple, you kill them before they kill you
Jokes aside
If you struggle to live
You can also replace Goliath with murphy
So when gmurphy stack too much sacrifice
Murphy can remove 50%of it with her 3 costs
And also reduce 50% of enemeis dmg with her exalt

Put more aggressive wheels on Murphy
Give her dmg like the To My Dearest Friend on Goliath and the SSR on Myriam
Allow her to carry
Make sure someone has exalt available whenever you need to block damage
Birth of a Soul is also amazing for that team if you have it
Should I use doll instead if Ramona?
And who should be on my lineup?

when building teams, you should pick one character to be the carry, and then 3 others that provide buffs/support/utility

an example starter team you can play is Gmurphy, Miryam, Aigis, Faint. these characters are all good into endgame and worth leveling to 60

In this example Gmurphy is the carry
Hi guys I want to ask. For the claim free limited chara who should I get?

You only get one copy of the character, so the usual recommendations for characters that are good if you have 0 duplicates are

- corposant
- clementine
- castor
all are solid supports
pickman is less good with 0 dupes but you can consider him if your main team is caro
the other characters are all pretty good but need more copies to shine
they are main carries so don't work well at low investment
I was thinking of getting Clem actually because people say she’s good 🤔
She's pretty good
Castor is the better and safer pick for immediate impact. Clementine is  a higher investment.

early on shes just a generically good aequor character who supports and deals high dmg

example team you can run for early game is gmurphy caecus faros aigis

thais would replace caecus or faros

i dont like standard character banner because you cant guarantee anything

so its your call
at least with wheel banner you have a guarantee at 90 pulls
so you can make slow and steady progress
i do think you lack breadth and you will have trouble making 5 teams for d-tide
which you should do once you hit character level 50, it's missable time gated rewards
so it might be worth pulling a bit of other realms to get literally anyone so you can fill out 5 teams
